# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Write Envoy proxy configuration for HTTP traffic routing. Define listeners on port 80, clusters for backend services, and routes to match requests. Configure connection pooling and health checks for upstream services. This is for our API gateway proxy.
# Category: envoy_no_tls

static_resources:
  listeners:
  - name: listener_http
    address:
      socket_address:
        address: 0.0.0.0
        port_value: 80
    filter_chains:
    - filters:
      - name: envoy.filters.network.http_connection_manager
        typed_config:
          "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.network.http_connection_manager.v3.HttpConnectionManager
          stat_prefix: ingress_http
          codec_type: AUTO
          route_config:
            name: local_route
            virtual_hosts:
            - name: backend_api
              domains: ["*"] # Matches all domains
              routes:
              - match:
                  prefix: "/api/v1/users"
                route:
                  cluster: users_service_cluster
                  timeout: 5s
              - match:
                  prefix: "/api/v1/products"
                route:
                  cluster: products_service_cluster
                  timeout: 5s
              - match:
                  prefix: "/api/v1/orders"
                route:
                  cluster: orders_service_cluster
                  timeout: 5s
              # Default route for any other /api/v1 requests
              - match:
                  prefix: "/api/v1"
                route:
                  cluster: default_api_service_cluster
                  timeout: 5s
              # Catch-all route for other paths
              - match:
                  prefix: "/"
                route:
                  cluster: default_frontend_cluster
                  timeout: 5s
          http_filters:
          - name: envoy.filters.http.router
            typed_config:
              "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.http.router.v3.Router

  clusters:
  - name: users_service_cluster
    connect_timeout: 1s
    type: STATIC
    lb_policy: ROUND_ROBIN
    load_assignment:
      cluster_name: users_service_cluster
      endpoints:
      - lb_endpoints:
        - endpoint:
            address:
              socket_address:
                address: 127.0.0.1 # Replace with your actual backend IP or DNS name
                port_value: 8080
    # Connection Pooling Configuration
    http2_protocol_options: {} # Enables HTTP/2 for connection pooling
    circuit_breakers:
      thresholds:
      - priority: DEFAULT
        max_connections: 1024
        max_pending_requests: 1024
        max_requests: 1024
        max_retries: 3
    # Health Check Configuration
    health_checks:
    - timeout: 1s
      interval: 5s
      unhealthy_threshold: 3
      healthy_threshold: 1
      http_health_check:
        path: "/health" # Health check endpoint on the backend service
        host: "users-service.local" # Host header for the health check request

  - name: products_service_cluster
    connect_timeout: 1s
    type: STATIC
    lb_policy: ROUND_ROBIN
    load_assignment:
      cluster_name: products_service_cluster
      endpoints:
      - lb_endpoints:
        - endpoint:
            address:
              socket_address:
                address: 127.0.0.1 # Replace with your actual backend IP or DNS name
                port_value: 8081
    http2_protocol_options: {}
    circuit_breakers:
      thresholds:
      - priority: DEFAULT
        max_connections: 1024
        max_pending_requests: 1024
        max_requests: 1024
        max_retries: 3
    health_checks:
    - timeout: 1s
      interval: 5s
      unhealthy_threshold: 3
      healthy_threshold: 1
      http_health_check:
        path: "/health"
        host: "products-service.local"

  - name: orders_service_cluster
    connect_timeout: 1s
    type: STATIC
    lb_policy: ROUND_ROBIN
    load_assignment:
      cluster_name: orders_service_cluster
      endpoints:
      - lb_endpoints:
        - endpoint:
            address:
              socket_address:
                address: 127.0.0.1 # Replace with your actual backend IP or DNS name
                port_value: 8082
    http2_protocol_options: {}
    circuit_breakers:
      thresholds:
      - priority: DEFAULT
        max_connections: 1024
        max_pending_requests: 1024
        max_requests: 1024
        max_retries: 3
    health_checks:
    - timeout: 1s
      interval: 5s
      unhealthy_threshold: 3
      healthy_threshold: 1
      http_health_check:
        path: "/health"
        host: "orders-service.local"

  - name: default_api_service_cluster
    connect_timeout: 1s
    type: STATIC
    lb_policy: ROUND_ROBIN
    load_assignment:
      cluster_name: default_api_service_cluster
      endpoints:
      - lb_endpoints:
        - endpoint:
            address:
              socket_address:
                address: 127.0.0.1 # Default backend for API
                port_value: 8090
    http2_protocol_options: {}
    circuit_breakers:
      thresholds:
      - priority: DEFAULT
        max_connections: 1024
        max_pending_requests: 1024
        max_requests: 1024
        max_retries: 3
    health_checks:
    - timeout: 1s
      interval: 5s
      unhealthy_threshold: 3
      healthy_threshold: 1
      http_health_check:
        path: "/health"
        host: "default-api.local"

  - name: default_frontend_cluster
    connect_timeout: 1s
    type: STATIC
    lb_policy: ROUND_ROBIN
    load_assignment:
      cluster_name: default_frontend_cluster
      endpoints:
      - lb_endpoints:
        - endpoint:
            address:
              socket_address:
                address: 127.0.0.1 # Default backend for general traffic
                port_value: 8000
    http2_protocol_options: {}
    circuit_breakers:
      thresholds:
      - priority: DEFAULT
        max_connections: 1024
        max_pending_requests: 1024
        max_requests: 1024
        max_retries: 3
    health_checks:
    - timeout: 1s
      interval: 5s
      unhealthy_threshold: 3
      healthy_threshold: 1
      http_health_check:
        path: "/health"
        host: "default-frontend.local"
admin:
  access_log_path: "/dev/stdout"
  address:
    socket_address:
      protocol: TCP
      address: 0.0.0.0
      port_value: 9901
